name: HARROW, INC.
business: Harrow is a leading provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions in North America, selling FDA-approved branded ophthalmic pharmaceuticals and compounded formulations through its ImprimisRx pharmacy business. The company markets products for conditions such as dry eye disease, wet age-related macular degeneration, cataracts, glaucoma, and other ocular surface and retina diseases. Sales are primarily to U.S. eyecare professionals, wholesalers, ambulatory surgery centers, hospitals, and patients.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions in North America, and were founded with a commitment to deliver safe, effective, accessible, and affordable medications that enhance patient compliance and improve clinical outcomes.
CR-01 (conjunctival delivery device): is in the proof-of-concept evaluation stage, with potential launch as early as 2029.
ImprimisRx is our ophthalmology-focused pharmaceutical compounding business.

catalysts.sentence: The Melt acquisition closed on November 17, 2025, and was treated as an asset acquisition for accounting purposes.
Following completion of these studies, we expect to prepare and submit an NDA for MELT-300 in the first half of 2027.
If promptly approved by the FDA, we expect to commercially launch MELT-300 in the second half of 2028.
We expect to commercially launch BYOOVIZ in mid-2026.
We expect to commercially launch OPUVIZ in mid-2027.
We expect to commercially launch BYQLOVI in mid-2026.
We expect pass-through status for IHEEZO to expire March 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Announcement of VEVYE Access for All program
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we announced a patient access program called VEVYE Access for All.
In March 2025, we initiated a 360-degree review of opportunities to offer ImprimisRx customers a Harrow-owned FDA-approved product alternative to a compounded formulation.

catalysts.event: Announcement of Harrow Access For All (HAFA)
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we announced Harrow Access For All (HAFA) to expand our proprietary patient access model from a single product to encompass Harrow's comprehensive ophthalmic portfolio of branded, authorized generics (AGx), and compounded ophthalmic medications.
